title: blechnum reflexum
intro: Blechnum reflexum, also known as the slender chain fern, is a type of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Blechnum reflexum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as being used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Blechnum reflexum typically involve drying the fronds and using them in teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
